untranslatable_reason: Signal requires calibration of band containment to 85-90% of trading activity range across lookback period. This requires dynamic calculation of the percentage of price bars contained within bands over a lookback window — a meta-indicator not available in the allowed indicator set. The entry condition also requires confirmation that 'bands contain 85-90% of all trading activity' which cannot be expressed with standard price/indicator comparisons. Additionally, exit requires '[THRESHOLD_NEEDED] consecutive bars' which is a state-tracking condition requiring bar counting logic not supported by the 3-field operator structure. The source text is incomplete and does not specify the exact band type (Keltner, Bollinger, Donchian) or parameterization.
translation_notes: Attempted mapping to Bollinger Bands as closest proxy to 'bands' concept. However, the core signal requires: (1) dynamic band calibration based on containment percentage, (2) verification that bands statistically contain 85-90% of activity, and (3) consecutive bar counter logic. These are not expressible within the constraint of simple left-operator-right comparisons. A full implementation would require custom metric calculation outside standard indicator library.
